title: Create a Solar Design
description: Name the design, file it, then set the location that fixes irradiance and tariff.

steps.title: Project name
steps.description: Every design starts with a name.
steps.fallbackMessage: Project name: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Folder
steps.description: Designs are filed so you can find them later.
steps.voiceScript: File it in a folder so you can find it again.
steps.captionText: File it in a folder so you can find it again.
steps.fallbackMessage: Folder: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create and set location
steps.description: The next screen is the globe: pick the site.
steps.voiceScript: Create the project. The next screen is the globe, where you pick the site. Location fixes the sun hours, the temperature and the tariff.
steps.captionText: Create the project. The next screen is the globe, where you pick the site. Location fixes the sun hours, the temperature and the tariff.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create and set location: not visible on this screen yet.
